sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
target = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']

print("Player:", player[0]['boundary'] if player else "None")
print("Target:", target[0]['boundary'] if target else "None")

# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before_nodes = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    after_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    print("Before nodes count:", len(before_nodes))
    print("After nodes count:", len(after_nodes))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
